highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (next) includes a native resource leak fix in SKImage.
highlights_body: This unreleased branch corrects a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) and adds a cross-platform performance tracker.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking the native handle when the subset was applied. The handle is now correctly disposed in all code paths.
